hooks.command: root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; if [ ! -f "$root/.hooks/stop-doccheck.sh" ]; then d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/.hooks/stop-doccheck.sh" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; root="$d"; fi; if [ ! -f "$root/.hooks/stop-doccheck.sh" ]; then printf '%s\n' '{"continue":true,"systemMessage":"project-flow stop hook script not found"}'; exit 0; fi; bash "$root/.hooks/stop-doccheck.sh" codex
